title: Zoto Eval Case Meta Block
description: Every generated eval case carries a _meta block. Cases without _meta or with _meta.generated=false are user-authored and are never touched by the updater.

primitive_analysis.description: Cached LLM analyser output for the source primitive (subtask 04). Consumers MUST re-invoke the analyser when `source_hash` no longer matches the live primitive's sha256 OR when `invalidate` is true. The configurer (subtask 02) sets `invalidate: true` when a framework/strategy switch makes prior analysis stale.

source_hash.description: sha256 of the source primitive markdown (skill/command/agent/hook/rule body) at analysis time.

analysed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp recorded when the analyser produced this entry.

analyser_version.description: Free-form version string (e.g. semver, git ref, or analyser prompt hash) used to spot drift in analyser logic itself.

summary.description: Short natural-language summary of the analyser's findings for this primitive — used for human review and for differential prompts on update.

invalidate.description: When true, subtask 04's analyser flow treats the cache entry as stale on the next run regardless of source_hash. Used by subtask 02's configurer when framework/strategy switches occur.
